req.title: Vital signs validation
req.statement: An Observation with category vital-signs shall have value in clinically plausible range; out-of-range shall be flagged for review.
expected_outcomes: flag raised if out of range

doc.reasoning: Vital signs validation requires testing that observations with category 'vital-signs' are accepted when in clinically plausible ranges, rejected or flagged when out of range, and correctly handle boundary conditions. Test design applies Equivalence Partitioning (valid vs. invalid ranges), Boundary Value Analysis (edge values), and Negative Path testing (malformed/missing data). All tests target the POST /Observation endpoint and verify both successful storage and review flag generation.

tests.name: test_vital_signs_normal_systolic_blood_pressure
actions: POST /Observation with category='vital-signs', code='8480-6' (systolic BP), value=120 mmHg
trace: Normal range systolic BP (90-180 mmHg) accepted without flag
tests.executable:
import requests
import json

def test_vital_signs_normal_systolic_blood_pressure():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<get_clinician_token>'
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Observation',
        'category': [{'coding': [{'system': 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category', 'code': 'vital-signs'}]}],
        'code': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://loinc.org', 'code': '8480-6', 'display': 'Systolic blood pressure'}]},
        'valueQuantity': {'value': 120, 'unit': 'mmHg', 'system': 'http://unitsofmeasure.org', 'code': 'mm[Hg]'},
        'status': 'final',
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/p123'}
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Observation', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'id' in data
    assert data.get('status') == 'final'
    assert 'reviewFlag' not in data or data['reviewFlag'] is False

tests.name: test_vital_signs_hypertensive_systolic_out_of_range
actions: POST /Observation with category='vital-signs', code='8480-6', value=250 mmHg (exceeds safe range)
trace: R-HLT-019: out-of-range observation flagged for review
Systolic BP 250 mmHg exceeds safe range; review task must be created
tests.executable:
import requests
import json

def test_vital_signs_hypertensive_systolic_out_of_range():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<get_clinician_token>'
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Observation',
        'category': [{'coding': [{'system': 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category', 'code': 'vital-signs'}]}],
        'code': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://loinc.org', 'code': '8480-6'}]},
        'valueQuantity': {'value': 250, 'unit': 'mmHg', 'system': 'http://unitsofmeasure.org', 'code': 'mm[Hg]'},
        'status': 'final',
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/p123'}
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Observation', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert data.get('reviewFlag') is True
    assert 'extension' in data
    task_ref = [ext for ext in data.get('extension', []) if 'clinical-alert' in ext.get('url', '')]
    assert len(task_ref) > 0

tests.name: test_vital_signs_boundary_systolic_upper_limit
preconditions: clinically plausible range for systolic BP is 50–250 mmHg
actions: POST /Observation with category='vital-signs', code='8480-6', value=250 mmHg (upper boundary)
trace: R-HLT-019: boundary value 250 mmHg tested at upper limit
At or near threshold, flag must be raised; review task created

tests.name: test_vital_signs_missing_value_quantity
actions: POST /Observation with category='vital-signs', code='8480-6', but no valueQuantity field
trace: Missing value causes 400 Bad Request; no storage or flag

tests.name: test_vital_signs_heart_rate_normal_range
actions: POST /Observation with category='vital-signs', code='8867-4' (heart rate), value=72 bpm
trace: R-HLT-019: normal heart rate (60–100 bpm) accepted
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_vital_signs_heart_rate_normal_range():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<get_clinician_token>'
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Observation',
        'category': [{'coding': [{'system': 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category', 'code': 'vital-signs'}]}],
        'code': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://loinc.org', 'code': '8867-4', 'display': 'Heart rate'}]},
        'valueQuantity': {'value': 72, 'unit': 'bpm', 'system': 'http://unitsofmeasure.org', 'code': '/min'},
        'status': 'final',
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/p123'}
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Observation', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'id' in data
    assert data.get('reviewFlag') is not True
